reason: While adding 'nodev' is a standard hardening practice, it modifies /etc/fstab. If a non-root partition is used to host device nodes or is required by a specific application/service to function as a block/character device, applying this change will break that service. Manual verification of partition usage is necessary.
estimated_impact: filesystems affected; Potential breakage of services relying on device nodes on non-root partitions; Modification of /etc/fstab can impact system boot if syntax is incorrect
